cast.name: 罗比·威廉姆斯 Robbie Williams

director.name: 哈密什·汉密尔顿 Hamish Hamilton

introduction: If you're lookin' for Robbie you've com to the right place!The Robbie Williams Show was in many ways his comeback concert, having taken a year off from performing. Robbie gave a respectful nod and a wiggle to Elvis before launching into an adrenalin filled performance, captured here on DVD in Stereo and 5.1 Surround Sound. Determined once again to push the bounds of entertainment, Robbie invaded Pinewood with a spectacular stage set of 60ft scaffolding, an explosion of lights, a troupe of 80 electric dancers and a set of songs so hot the studio was in meltdown.The show in ninety minutes of pure Robbie as he wends his way through classic hits such as Strong, Angels and Rock DJ, swings his stuff through the standards and blasts the audience with new material from the best selling album of 2002, Escapology.Backstage and aftersow footage: the DVD also includes the documentary 'What A Performance', a 23 minute visual equivalent of an Access All Areas pass. Visit Robbie in his dressing room as he larks about with his inimitable wit and banter, and find out the real truth behind his dieting habits!Bonus Tracks: extras include four previously unseen tracks from the show.Gallery: stunning on, off and backstage photographs with stills from Hamish Brown.Game: if you're really clever you can play the 'follow the lights' game and be royally rewarded with extra footage.Contains over 120 minutes of footage.
